steps.title: Focus on the shared trait
steps.content: The task is to emphasize a similarity between The Dungeon and The Fighting Ranger. The notes say both are silent films from the 1920s, both would be valuable historical documents, and both are now lost.

steps.title: Name both films together
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes different directors, Choice B discusses archives instead of the movies, and Choice C covers only The Fighting Ranger. The effective sentence names both films and states the shared facts that they would be valuable historical documents and are lost. The answer is D.
